title: filix fragrans
intro: Filix fragrans, also known as male fern, is a species of fern that is native to Europe and Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to remove parasitic worms and other intestinal parasites from the body. The health benefits of Filix fragrans include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can aid in treating skin conditions and wounds, as well as its potential to reduce fever and relieve digestive issues. Filix fragrans is often prepared as an herbal remedy through the use of teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a variety of ailments.
